return(function(...)local r=I(true)local k=h(r)k[m(623350-577084)],k[m(1960520765%10771838)],k[m(410391-364118)]=u,D,function()return-180524+-1313000 end return r else return b({},{[m(72999529%499680)]=D,[m(-854213+(-279042+85057776)%16775651)]=u;[m(724015+-677742)]=function()return-1803454-(-309930)end})end end,function(u,m)local k=R(m)local I=function(I,b)return r(u,{I;b},m,k)end return I end,function(u)c[u]=c[u]-(-408669-(-408670))if c[u]==-173081+173081 then c[u],n[u]=nil,nil end end,{}return(E(-357788+2229702542%14598654,{}))(k(l))end)(getmetatable,getfenv
